languages.text: {n}Тяжелый взгляд Батошски почти физически упирается вам в грудь.{/n} "Первый Призыв. Наши предшественники дали клятву верности вашему предку, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Мы намерены исполнить ее. Так или иначе..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Тяжелый взгляд Батошски почти физически упирается вам в грудь.{/n} "Первый Призыв. Наши предшественники дали клятву верности вашему предку, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Мы намерены исполнить ее. Так или иначе..."
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."
languages.original_text: {n}Тяжелый взгляд Батошски почти физически упирается вам в грудь.{/n} "Первый Призыв. Наши предшественники дали клятву верности вашему предку, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Мы намерены исполнить ее. Так или иначе..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski's heavy gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

{n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

"Our great-grandfathers and great-grandmothers swore an oath, Vedka. The First Call-Up, not us. That's ancient history, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Which has nothing to do with you or us. We're hardly an active regiment, are we? And certainly none of us are Merovians — we were all born here on Zarkov."

{n}Batoshski's heavy gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

{n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

{n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

languages.text: 「私たちの曾祖父と曾祖母たちは誓いを立てた、ヴェドカ。最初の召集令は彼ら、私たちではない。それは古代の歴史だ、貴{mf|卿|女爵}。あなたや私たちとは関係ない。我々はほとんど活動していない連隊だ。そして、我々にはメロヴィアンは一人もいない。我々は皆、ザルコフで生まれたのだ」
languages.original_text: "Our great-grandfathers and great-grandmothers swore an oath, Vedka. The First Call-Up, not us. That's ancient history, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Which has nothing to do with you or us. We're hardly an active regiment, are we? And certainly none of us are Merovians — we were all born here on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「私たちの曾祖父と曾祖母たちは誓いを立てた、ヴェドカ。最初の召集令は彼ら、私たちではない。それは古代の歴史だ、貴{mf|卿|女爵}。あなたや私たちとは関係ない。我々はほとんど活動していない連隊だ。そして、我々にはメロヴィアンは一人もいない。我々は皆、ザルコフで生まれたのだ。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshskis durchdringender Blick lastet schwer auf deiner Brust.{/n} "Die Erste Einberufung. Unsere Vorfahren schworen Eurem Ahnherrn einen Eid, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Und wir werden ihn erfüllen. So oder so ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshskis durchdringender Blick lastet schwer auf deiner Brust.{/n} "Die Erste Einberufung. Unsere Vorfahren schworen Eurem Ahnherrn einen Eid, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Und wir werden ihn erfüllen. So oder so ..."

languages.text: {n}Le regard brûlant de Batoshski pèse sur votre poitrine avec une force presque palpable.{/n} « La Première Mobilisation. Nos prédécesseurs ont prêté serment de fidélité à votre ancêtre, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Et nous avons la ferme intention de l'honorer, d'une façon ou d'une autre... »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard brûlant de Batoshski pèse sur votre poitrine avec une force presque palpable.{/n} « La Première Mobilisation. Nos prédécesseurs ont prêté serment de fidélité à votre ancêtre, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Et nous avons la ferme intention de l'honorer, d'une façon ou d'une autre... »

languages.text: {n}La intensa mirada de Batoshski casi ejerce fuerza física sobre tu pecho.{/n} «Los primeros llamados. Nuestros predecesores juraron lealtad a su antepasado, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian, y honraremos ese juramento. De un modo u otro...».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

traits.locale_text: {n}La intensa mirada de Batoshski casi ejerce fuerza física sobre tu pecho.{/n} «Los primeros llamados. Nuestros predecesores juraron lealtad a su antepasado, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian, y honraremos ese juramento. De un modo u otro...».

languages.text: {n}Batoshski'nin yoğun bakışları, neredeyse fiziksel bir güçle göğsüne bastırıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu. Bizden öncekiler, atanıza sadakat yemini etmişlerdi Seberian'ın vârisi. Yeminimizi tutmaya niyetliyiz. Öyle ya da böyle..."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski'nin yoğun bakışları, neredeyse fiziksel bir güçle göğsüne bastırıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu. Bizden öncekiler, atanıza sadakat yemini etmişlerdi Seberian'ın vârisi. Yeminimizi tutmaya niyetliyiz. Öyle ya da böyle..."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基那灼热的目光，仿佛带着千钧之力压在你的胸口。{/n}“从初代征召者就开始了。我们的前辈向您的先祖宣誓效忠，塞贝里安的继承人。我们会履行这个誓言，无论付出什么代价……”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基那灼热的目光，仿佛带着千钧之力压在你的胸口。{/n}“从初代征召者就开始了。我们的前辈向您的先祖宣誓效忠，塞贝里安的继承人。我们会履行这个誓言，无论付出什么代价……”
